title: LAP TIME detail page » MAGAZINE ISSUE
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the LAP TIME detail page to show the connected MAGAZINE ISSUE
So I can ...
description:
* The LAP TIME detail page is extended to contain a section for the connected MAGAZINE ISSUE.
* The MAGAZINE ISSUE is presented with its name and primary information.
* The MAGAZINE ISSUE contains a link to its detail page.
* The MAGAZINE ISSUE has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no MAGAZINE ISSUE connected to the LAP TIME then the section is not displayed at all.
